items.title: Suggestion: add a current Canadian student jobs companion resource
items.description:
Hi! I’m Hanzi, the builder of Hanzilla Jobs.

I noticed this repo is a Canadian tech internship list for students, but it is for the 2025 cycle, so many direct application links are now likely closed. Would you be open to adding a small “current companion resources” note near the top for students who still land here from search?

Suggested one-liner:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canadian internships/co-ops](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/) — free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad job board covering internships, co-ops, new grad, junior, and entry-level roles across tech, finance, engineering, business, sciences, and more.
```

A few verification/context links:
- About/verification: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/
- New grad/junior roles: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/
- Software engineering category: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/categories/software-engineering/

No pressure if you want to keep the repo strictly as an archived 2025 table; I’m suggesting it only because students may still find the repo via Google and need a current Canada-specific follow-up resource.

items.title: README design and code style
items.description:
- Make a banner for the repo, make it look nice
- Add github pipeline to automatically change the README style to some standard format
- Make a banner to thank contributers
- Possibly get this SEO optimized
